executeTPSL(uint256,bytes[]).notice: Execute Take Profit or Stop Loss for an open position

increasePosition(uint256,uint256,uint256.notice: Add size to an existing position with weighted-average entry price

placeMarketOrder(bytes32,bool,uint256,ui.notice: Place a Market Order with instant execution using frontend-injected Pyth data
